name: bridle
description: AI chat relay — Hub + Embed SDK + Docs

scripts.heroku-postbuild: cd sdk && npm ci && npm run build && cd ../docs && npm ci && npm run build && cd .. && rm -rf _static && cp -r docs/docs/.vitepress/dist _static
scripts.build: cd sdk && npm ci && npm run build && cd ../docs && npm ci && npm run build && cd .. && rm -rf _static && cp -r docs/docs/.vitepress/dist _static
